title: Living in Boulder Vlog 2 - 19 - 2017: European Tribes in Background

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs late at night from Boulder, covering two main topics: a digital map project he's been building showing prehistoric European tribes, ancient cities, and tribal capitals with walls and concentric circles, and a day spent deep-cleaning what appears to be a van or camper. He also mentions working on his website, reorganizing audiobook pages by country.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: proud of it and wants to do a dedicated video about it
compulsively thorough despite his mom saying he's overdoing it
believes ancient Greece was wetter with more lakes and more people, and has since dried out
prefers organizing by individual country pages rather than one combined page for consistency with his timeline
